epics.title: User Authentication
epics.description: Develop secure login functionality with multi-factor authentication using FastAPI for backend and React for frontend. Integration with existing bank systems to validate user credentials.

epics.title: Database Schema
epics.summary: Design and implement the database schema.
epics.description: Create the PostgreSQL database schema to store user data, account information, service requests, and interaction history. Ensure the schema is optimized for performance and security.

epics.title: Basic UI Shell
epics.summary: Set up the basic UI shell.
epics.description: Develop the basic UI shell using React to serve as the foundation for all frontend components. Ensure responsiveness and alignment with the design guidelines.

epics.title: Core Banking System Integration
epics.summary: Integrate with the bank's core banking system.
epics.description: Implement the integration layer between the portal and the bank's core banking system using FastAPI. Ensure secure and efficient data exchange.

epics.title: Personalized Dashboard
epics.summary: Develop a personalized dashboard for users.
epics.description: Create a personalized dashboard using React to display available banking products and services based on user profile and eligibility. Real-time data fetching from the backend.

epics.title: Account Opening Workflow
epics.description: Develop the streamlined workflow for users to submit account opening requests with minimal clicks. Backend validation and processing through FastAPI.

epics.title: Service Modifications Workflow
epics.description: Develop the streamlined workflow for users to submit service modification requests. Backend validation and processing through FastAPI.

epics.title: Real-time Status Updates
epics.summary: Enable real-time status updates for user requests.
epics.description: Implement functionality to provide real-time status updates for submitted requests, using WebSockets for real-time communication between frontend and backend.

epics.title: Email Notifications
epics.description: Develop the email notification system to send users updates regarding their submitted requests. Ensure secure and reliable email delivery.

epics.title: Responsive Design
epics.summary: Ensure the portal is responsive across devices.
epics.description: Implement responsive design principles using React to ensure the portal works seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

epics.title: Interaction History
epics.summary: Track and display user interaction history.
epics.description: Develop functionality to track and display a comprehensive history of user interactions within the portal. Provide detailed records for user review.

epics.title: Role-Based Access Control
epics.description: Develop and enforce role-based access controls to ensure users can only access services appropriate to their profile and authorization level.

epics.title: Performance Optimization
epics.description: Conduct performance tuning and optimization for both frontend and backend systems to ensure smooth and efficient operation of the portal under load.

Core Domain Objects:
- Transaction
- Performance Metrics
- User Requests

Attributes & Rules:
- System logs for performance tracking
- Minimization of latency
- Efficient handling of concurrent operations

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Performance tracking setup
Given the system logs are enabled
When a data exchange operation is initiated
Then the performance metrics should be logged
And the system efficiency should be tracked

Scenario: Latency minimization
Given a data exchange request
When the operation is processed
Then the data should be exchanged with minimal latency

Scenario: Concurrent operation handling
Given multiple data exchange requests
When the system processes them
Then all operations should be handled efficiently
And system performance should remain optimal

user_stories.epic_title: Develop a personalized dashboard for users.
user_stories.title: Integrate real-time data fetching
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to see real-time data on my dashboard, so that I access the most current information.

Core Domain Objects:
- Dashboard
- Data source
- Real-time data

Attributes & Rules:
- Real-time fetching of data
- Data freshness should be within 5 seconds
- Handle data fetching errors gracefully

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Real-time data is visible
Given the dashboard is loaded
When new real-time data is available
Then the dashboard should refresh with the new data

Scenario: Handle data fetching errors
Given the dashboard encounters a data fetching error
When the data fetch fails
Then an error message should be displayed to the user

Scenario: Data freshness
Given regular data updates
When user is viewing the dashboard
Then the data should be updated every 5 seconds

Test Cases:

Then an error message should be displayed to the user

Scenario: Data freshness
Given regular data updates
When user is viewing the dashboard
Then the data should be updated every 5 seconds

- Display detailed information on each product

Scenario: Display product details

Given a user is not eligible for certain products

user_stories.title: Implement user authentication on dashboard
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to log in to the dashboard securely, so that my data is protected.

Core Domain Objects:
- User account
- Authentication token
- Session

Attributes & Rules:
- Secure authentication
- Tokens must be valid for a session duration
- Log out after inactivity for 30 minutes

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successful login
Given a user with valid credentials
When the user logs in
Then access to the dashboard is granted

Scenario: Session timeout
Given a user logs in
When there is no activity for 30 minutes
Then the user is logged out

Scenario: Invalid credentials
Given a user with invalid credentials
When the user attempts to log in
Then access to the dashboard is denied

architecture_generation.description: Azure self-service banking portal where Bank Customer traffic enters via Azure Front Door (WAF/CDN) and reaches a Portal Web App (App Service/Static Web Apps) that authenticates users with Microsoft Entra ID (or Entra ID B2C) and calls Azure API Management for JWT validation, throttling, and routing to backend services (AKS/App Service APIs and Azure Functions/Logic Apps) which persist portal-owned transactional data in Azure SQL Database and store uploaded documents in Azure Blob Storage, with API Management also brokering integrations to the external Core Banking System and backend services using Entra-issued tokens and managed identities for downstream access.

architecture_validation.updatedDescription: Added required reliability components for Azure SQL multi-region failover (geo-replica and failover group) and connected them to the existing SQL node. All original nodes/edges preserved; no duplicates or missing references. Architecture quality rating: Improved (Reliability strengthened).
